---
name: New pack request
about: Propose a new library or platform pack for the repository
title: "[pack] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Library or platform

Name the library, framework, or platform.

## Why it fits this repo

Explain why it belongs as a reusable OSS pack.

## Official docs

List the official documentation links that should anchor the pack.

## Suggested topology

Propose a first pass, for example:

- overview-and-routing
- setup
- runtime or integration
- advanced workflows

## Notes

Anything else that would help scope the pack cleanly.
